optimizations.title: Checkout repeated 5x across jobs
optimizations.description: actions/checkout appears 5 times. Each checkout adds ~5-15s.
optimizations.suggestedFix: Use a composite action or reusable workflow to share checkout + setup.

optimizations.title: pnpm install repeated 5x
optimizations.description: Each pnpm install takes 30-90s even with cache. Total overhead: 300s.
optimizations.suggestedFix: Create composite action: checkout ÔåÆ pnpm ÔåÆ node ÔåÆ install ÔåÆ prisma generate. Reuse across jobs.

optimizations.title: Prisma generate repeated 4x
optimizations.description: npx prisma generate runs in 4 jobs. Could generate once and share via artifact.
optimizations.suggestedFix: Generate Prisma client once in first job, upload as artifact, download in other jobs.

optimizations.title: Cache key uses exact SHA (low hit rate)
optimizations.description: Using github.sha as cache key means cache only hits on re-runs, not new commits.
optimizations.suggestedFix: Use hashFiles for primary key, SHA for restore-keys fallback.

optimizations.title: 5 separate turbo run commands
optimizations.description: Each turbo run has startup overhead. Combine into single turbo pipeline.
optimizations.currentState:
turbo run lint
  turbo run check
  turbo run test
  turbo run build
  turbo run security
optimizations.suggestedFix: Combine: npx turbo run lint check-types test build security --concurrency=100%

optimizations.title: 5 static sleep commands (160s total)
optimizations.description: Static sleeps waste time. Replace with health-check loops.
optimizations.suggestedFix: Replace 'sleep N' with: while ! pg_isready -h 127.0.0.1 -U postgres; do sleep 2; done

optimizations.title: No job timeout configured
optimizations.description: Jobs without timeout-minutes can run indefinitely on hung processes.
optimizations.suggestedFix: Add timeout-minutes: 30 to each job to prevent runaway costs.

optimizations.title: Actions use tag versions instead of SHA pins
optimizations.description: Tag-based versions (e.g., @v4) can be moved. SHA-pinning prevents supply chain attacks.
optimizations.suggestedFix: Pin critical actions to SHA: e.g., actions/checkout@<sha>

optimizations.title: Potential secret exposure in echo/log output
optimizations.description: Secrets used near echo commands could be accidentally logged.
optimizations.suggestedFix: Use ::add-mask:: for dynamic secrets. Never echo ${{ secrets.* }}.
